decision_commentary: Second DG-09 pass — approve after redesign. All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (G), review_item (budget_alignment_post_redesign), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment ($195K within $200K budget), timestamp (2026-03-17T15:00:00-07:00, ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (advance_to_executive_plans), route_to (Hugo), sync_to_asana (false). Critical check: decision is 'approve' on second pass. Routing to Hugo for executive plans is correct — executive plans only proceed after budget alignment is approved. One-hour gap between reject (14:00) and approve (15:00) reflects the redesign loop processing time.
celia_routing_notes: Correctly approved second pass. route_to = Hugo for executive plans. next_action = advance_to_executive_plans — correct sequencing.
